name: commons-crew-vscode
description: The commons-crew runtime as a first-class panel: chat with a team of governed specialists materialized from the labor-commons catalog, working autonomously in your workspace.

commonsCrew.apiKey.markdownDescription: Your inference API key (BYO). Stored in settings — the runtime runs locally in the extension and calls this endpoint directly.

commonsCrew.model.markdownDescription: Model id, or `auto` (default) to pick the best tool-calling model from your provider's live catalog and cascade to the next-best on failure. Must support tool calling if set explicitly (e.g. Qwen3 family, Kimi-K2).

commonsCrew.fallbackModels.markdownDescription: Ordered fallback models tried when the primary model is transiently unavailable (busy / overloaded / 429 / 5xx). Ignored when commonsCrew.model is `auto` — the fallback chain is derived from the catalog instead. Example: `moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Instruct`, `Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B`.

commonsCrew.catalogRef.description: labor-commons branch/ref to materialize specialists from.

commonsCrew.autoApprove.description: Auto-approve file writes and command execution. When false, each side-effecting action asks for confirmation (the governance gate).

commonsCrew.maxIterations.description: Maximum autonomous tool-loop iterations per task before stopping.

commonsCrew.maxConcurrentLanes.markdownDescription: Maximum number of runs this extension executes at once. A safety valve on your own machine's/provider's load — not a platform limit.
